steps.title: Identify what comparison the example must demonstrate
steps.content: The passage claims peaking plants can generate more MWh/yr than some run-of-river plants. The example needs to compare a peaking plant's output to run-of-river plants' output to illustrate this claim.

steps.title: Find the choice showing a peaking plant outperforming run-of-river plants
steps.content:
A shows J. Woodruff (peaking) generating 193,864 MWh/yr, surpassing all run-of-river plants in the table.
  • B confuses generator count with output
  • C pairs only run-of-river plants
  • D inverts the relationship
.

A captures the peaking-vs.-run-of-river contrast that exemplifies the passage's claim.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
